approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve instructed the builder to continue the source/evaluator queue and keep live extraction, private auth, external writes, and hidden workers approval-bound. This card uses public GitHub/source lookup only.
scopeSummary: Create a public source eval packet for mattpocock/skills. Verify repo/license/catalog metadata, classify transferable agent-engineering patterns, record unverified 90-day context claims as blocked, and keep install/import/extraction/downstream writes blocked.
notApproved: Do not install the repo, run npx skills, install a plugin, create skill symlinks, mutate Claude/Codex config, import code, or copy raw skills/prompts.
Do not fetch YouTube transcripts, download videos, capture screenshots/keyframes, summarize video/course content, run vision, or call models.
Do not use paid course access, private auth, authorized browser sessions, comments, community data, or member data.
Do not write Research Inbox rows, KB pages, atoms, synthesis facts, action routes, vector/query indexes, backlog content from source material, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents, parallel builders, live agent runtime work, or extraction workers in this card.
